conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt a strong bond with D and F because we explicitly agreed to look out for each other and act as allies, which gave me a sense of security in this high-stakes environment. My conversation with I also stood out because we shared specific personal details about our families, creating a genuine sense of mutual understanding and empathy. On the other hand, I felt least connected to G, as our interaction was fairly brief and focused more on the uncertainty of the game than on building a personal rapport.

I made informal agreements with D and F to stick together and prioritize cooperation so we can both provide for our families. I feel a significant amount of trust in them because our motivations are so closely aligned, though I remain cautious of everyone else until the game truly begins.
